headline: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply chain risk
summary: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of War to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

headline: IBM Stock Plunges on AI Threat From Anthropic: Time to Rethink?
summary: IBM stock has tumbled 20.6% in three months after Anthropic's Claude Code threatened its legacy COBOL moat - can hybrid cloud and watsonx offset the risk?

headline: Semantic Web Market Research Report 2025-2030: Semantic AI Convergence Unlocks Real-Time Analytics, Autonomous Systems and Intelligent Automation
summary: The global semantic web market is set to expand from USD 2.71 billion in 2025 to USD 7.73 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 23.3%. This growth is fueled by enterprises adopting structured data frameworks to enhance interoperability and AI-driven analytics, motivated by regulatory compliance in sectors like finance and healthcare. headline: $81.04 Bn Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) Markets - Global Forecast to 2030 with IBM, Cisco, AWS, Google, Microsoft, Oracle, HPE, Intel, Hitachi, and SAP Leading
